raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nu Salamans bij
pabeidsis ta KUNGA
Nammu/ nn ta Rehni-
na Namnu taisiht ar wiſſu/ ko
Salamans bij ſawa Prahta ap-
nehmees darriht/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad parahdijahs tas
KUNGS Salamanam ohtru
Reisi/ ittin ka tas wiſſam Gi-
beona bij parahdijeeg.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazzija
us to: Es esnu tavu Luhgscha-
nu un tavu Sirds Saukschanu
klausijs/ ko tu preeſsch manna
Waiga effi luhsdie/ Es esnu ſcho
Namnu fwehtijs/ ko tu effi us-
taitijs/ ka es tur mannu Wahr-
du eezettu muhſchigi / un man-
nas Azzis un manna Sirds tur
buhs wiſſa Laika.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu/jatu manna Breek-
scha staigati / ittin ka taws
Tehws Dahwidseirr staigajs/ar
beswainigu un ſkaidru Sirdi /
darridams pehz wiſſu/ ko es tew
efinu pawehteis/ un turredains
mannus Likunnuſ un mannu
Teetu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad stiprinaſchu es taws
Walstibas Krehſlu pahr Israeſti
muhſchigi/ ittin ka es taws
Tehwam Dahwidam efimu run-
najs/ fazzidaame: Tew ne truhſ-
weens Wthrs no Israeſta Goh
Da-Krehſla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs greesin nogree-
fifceteeg ar juhſeein Behrneem
pakkaſ manni ne staigadamt/ u-
ne turrefeet mannuſ Banſlus u-
mannus Likunnuſ/ ko es preeſſch
juhfahm Azzim ltzzis / un eeſee
un kalpojeet fwetcheem Deeweem
un paklannifeetces preeſſch win-
neem/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad isdesdeschu es Israeſti
no tahs Semmes/ ko es teein ef-
mu dewis. Un tcho Namitu/ k-
es mannam Wahrdam efimu
fwehtijs/ atmettiſchu es no man-
na Waiga/ un Israeſts buhs pa-
faklamu Wahrdn un par Pafal-
ku starp wiſſahn Tautahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tchis Name/ (kas pir-
maſ augsti teizams bijis/) tahde-
buhs/ ka ifkatrs/ kas wiſſuu fez-
zen ees iſtruhzinafees/ un twil-
pehs/ un tee fazzihis: Kapehz ir-
tas KUNGS schai Semmet un-
schim Namman ta darrijs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad taps atbildchts: Pa-
to/ ka tee to KUNGSU ſawu Dee-
wu irr atſtahjuschi/ kas wiſſuu
Tehwus no Egiptes-Semmes-
isweddis/ un irr pee zitteem Dee-
weem turrejſchees / un preeſſch-
teem klauniuſchees/ un teem kal-
pojuſchi/ tapehz irr tas KUNGS-
scho Laununu teemi lizzis uſeer-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
